scored.statedInsightEvidence: Okay, `rainfall_mm` is the slot label, and `82` is the value copied from the `Chicago | 82 | March` row.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to struggle with distinguishing headers from cell values while completing the exercises.
